response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years of software development, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js product work and hands-on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) — a rare and explicitly required skill. React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and a deep testing/TDD culture are all evidenced across multiple roles. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, a frontend history weighted toward Ember rather than React, and no Kotlin, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated craftsmanship suggest these are quickly learnable.
strengths: Current full-stack TypeScript/Node.js work plus direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, matching the JD's hardest requirement
Strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
Broad polyglot and infrastructure experience: React, MongoDB/MySQL, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, high-throughput backend systems
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, both named in the primary stack
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
Kotlin is absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js/Vitest and limited React depth
